/aws-ecs-integ-alb-fg-ipv6/myService/Ser.data: Enable the 'circuitBreaker' property to trigger a quicker deployment failure if tasks are failing to come start (without this setting deployments may take up to 3 hours to fail). [ack: @aws-cdk/aws-ecs:shouldUseCircuitBreaker]

minHealthyPercent has not been configured so the default value of 50% is used. The number of running tasks will decrease below the desired count during deployments etc. See https://github.com/aws/aws-cdk/issues/31705 [ack: @aws-cdk/aws-ecs:minHealthyPercent]
